entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cicer arietinum) used to evaluate the effects of brewery effluent on seed germination and growth.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop (Zea mays) used to evaluate the effects of brewery effluent on seed germination and growth.

entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cajanus cajan) used to evaluate the effects of brewery effluent on seed germination and growth.

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The process by which an organism grows from a seed, used as a parameter to evaluate wastewater effects.

entities.name: GROWTH PARAMETERS
entities.description: Measurable characteristics of plant growth used to assess the impact of brewery effluent.

entities.name: GERMINATION PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The proportion of seeds that successfully germinate.

entities.name: GERMINATION RATE INDEX
entities.description: An index measuring the speed and percentage of seed germination.

entities.name: SEEDLING LENGTH
entities.description: The physical length of the germinated seedling.

entities.name: PHYTOTOXICITY INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the toxic effect of a substance on plant growth.

entities.name: SEED VIGOR INDEX
entities.description: An index reflecting the overall health and growth potential of the seed.

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the plant material produced.

entities.name: BREWERY WASTEWATER
entities.description: Wastewater from the brewing industry containing biodegradable organic compounds used for irrigation testing.

entities.name: UASBR EFFLUENT
entities.description: Effluent from an Upflow Anaerobic Sludge Blanket Reactor, a phase of brewery wastewater treatment.

entities.name: TC EFFLUENT
entities.description: Effluent from a treatment plant phase used to test phytotoxic effects on crops.

entities.name: RO REJECT
entities.description: Reject water from a reverse osmosis process used as a treatment in the study.

entities.name: TAP WATER
entities.description: Standard water used as a control treatment in the germination study.

entities.name: GERMINATION TEST
entities.description: A procedure performed in petri plates for 5 days to evaluate seed germination and growth.

entities.name: COMPLETELY RANDOMIZED DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to organize the water treatments and replications.

entities.name: PHYTOTOXICITY
entities.description: The toxic effect of brewery wastewater on plant growth and germination.

entities.name: BIODEGRADABLE ORGANIC COMPOUNDS
entities.description: Organic substances in brewery wastewater that can be broken down by biological processes.
